hooks.command: failed=0; echo '=== ruff check --fix ==='; ruff check --fix protocol/ storage/ api/ tests/ tools/ || failed=1; echo '=== ruff format ==='; ruff format protocol/ storage/ api/ tests/ tools/ || failed=1; echo '=== mypy ==='; mypy protocol/ storage/ api/ || failed=1; if [ $failed -ne 0 ]; then echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Pre-commit checks failed (ruff/mypy). Fix errors above before committing."}'; exit 1; fi
